title: Tapani (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tapani''' could refer to one of three things:

*[[Freeworlds Common Navy]]
*[[Shey Tapani]], who united the sector
*[[Tapani Arts and Sports Complex]]
*[[Tapani-class assault frigate]], a capital ship that was used in the sector
*[[Tapani-class carrier]]
*[[Tapani Day]]
*[[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] Region

{{Disambig}}
